title: Inventory Color Changer
description: Change the Inventory Design how you like it
body:
# Inventory Color Changer
![Player Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc8ebb0f6c0f127408acffcdefd2e7800fcf49e.png)

## Hotkeys
- Press V for opening the Screen to customize the Color (NEW rewritten 2.0 Version)
- Press K for opening the Screen to customize the Color (OLD Alpha Version)
- Press O (the Letter) to toggle/disable the Color 
  

## NEW REWRITTEN 2.0 VERSION
This Mod got completely rewritten. It has none of the old bugs, works better and multiple UIs can have the color overlay now. ALL of them can be toggled if not wanted.


## Why will the Alpha Version stay
If you want to see the old version or want to modify this version, feel free to do it. 
I tried to mark them clearly so you can easily see which is the new and which the old buggy Version. Feel free to use it.
The old Alpha Version creates a Bug with the Item Durability Bar. They are behind the Color layer, so they disappear when they are in your Inventory. This bug is already fixed in the newer versions, that arent marked as Alpha.

## Help
When you know how to fix this or have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.

[https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Inventory-Color-Changer](https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Inventory-Color-Changer)

## Screen
![Color Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e843e9b4e2188c40a41cd9204051e102e9d7de30.png)
